hypothesis: Mid layers select/expose IT candidates; late layers reconcile them with next-token prediction by supporting target tokens and suppressing alternatives.
limitations: Matched-prefix traces do not store per-layer logits, so support_target_delta, repulsion_top10_delta, and margin_delta are null here.
Direct promote/suppress logit deltas come from the pure PT/IT collector.
Findings are correlational/mediational unless followed by a targeted causal ablation.

supporting_appendix.caution: Older Exp3/Exp7 evidence is not treated as cross-family proof.
